content.speakerText: Here's your receipt. Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的收据，祝您今天愉快！

options.text: Can you give me a discount?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks! See you tomorrow.' 是礼貌且符合语境的回应，表达了感谢和友好道别。干扰项 'Okay, fine.' 显得冷漠无礼；'I don't need it.' 否认了对方的服务，不合礼仪；'Can you give me a discount?' 与当前语境无关，属于错误的请求时机。

content.speakerText: Your bag is safely stored. Thank you for choosing our service!
content.speakerTextCn: 您的行李已安全存放，感谢选择我们的服务！

options.text: Appreciate it! Have a wonderful day too.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Appreciate it! Have a wonderful day too.' 表达了感谢并回赠祝福，符合道别礼仪。'Whatever, I'm leaving now.' 过于粗鲁；'Is there a refund policy?' 偏离主题；'You're welcome.' 是回应感谢的语句，但此处说话者是服务方，顾客不应使用此回应。

content.speakerText: All set! Your locker key is here. Enjoy your trip!
content.speakerTextCn: 一切准备好了！这是您的储物柜钥匙，祝您旅途愉快！

options.text: Thank you so much! I really appreciate your help.
Can I get a coffee now?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thank you so much! I really appreciate your help.' 是标准、礼貌且情感丰富的回应，符合服务场景。干扰项均与道别感谢无关：'Can I get a coffee now?' 偏离主题；'I didn't ask for this.' 表达不满；'I'll call you later.' 不符合寄存场景的社交逻辑。

content.template: Thank you so much! I really ___ your help.
content.hint: 表达感激的正式动词，常用于服务场景
口语中简短表达感谢的常用语，常用于非正式但礼貌的场合
道别时表达‘明天见’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用搭配：see you + 时间

content.speakerText: Here's your receipt. Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的收据，祝您今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! I really appreciate your help.
Thanks so much! Have a wonderful day too!
Appreciate it! See you next time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的感谢和礼貌道别
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 appreciate / thanks / see you / have a great day 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Your items are securely stored. Thank you for using our service!
content.speakerTextCn: 您的物品已安全存放，感谢使用我们的服务！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! You've been so helpful.
Much appreciated! Have a great day!
Thanks a lot! I'm grateful for your service.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了服务方的感谢并表达正面情感
语言准确性：语法和用词正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气友好、不生硬，符合服务场景语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 thank / appreciate / grateful / have a great day 等关键词

content.speakerText: All done! Here’s your key. Enjoy your trip!
content.speakerTextCn: 一切完成！这是您的钥匙，祝您旅途愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I really appreciate your efficiency.
Great, thank you! See you when I come back.
Appreciate the quick service. Have a nice day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了服务完成的告知并表达感谢与祝福
语言准确性：句子结构完整，动词和介词使用正确
表达自然度：语调自然，符合真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了 appreciate / thanks / see you / have a nice day / service 等场景关键词
